notes: Imports sanitize_for_llm_prompt from integrity/input_guard (cross-package, allowed). _get_fred_key() works correctly: tries MarketMindConfig.fred_key first (line 462-467), falls back to os.environ FRED_KEY. Same pattern for _get_eia_key(). All data responses pass through _sanitize_text_fields() before returning. Logger calls use %s format, no f-string in log calls (compliance with logging best practices). Session-level cache with asyncio.Lock per key. FRED, CFTC SODA, EIA v2 all implemented with graceful degradation.
